2061887816196563291.full_text:
There was barely any debate or “gyan” when Sachin Tendulkar debuted for India at just 16 years old. But when it comes to Vaibhav Suryavanshi, suddenly everyone has strong opinions and wants to delay his debut.
I genuinely believe that even Sachin at that age wouldn’t have been as destructive and effective as Vaibhav is right now. I know this is controversial but this kid is a different beast. It sometimes feels like they want to hold Vaibhav back just to protect Sachin’s legacy as the youngest prodigy. Whether that’s true or not, the double standards are very visible.

The boy is ready. Let him play.
